metric_definitions.activation_share: activation_weight normalised to sum 1 across the concept's lemmas
metric_definitions.graph_influence: summed Phase-2 semantic-neighbour confidence from the lemma to its concept co-member lemmas
metric_definitions.in_concept_ayah_count: distinct concept-activating ayahs containing the lemma
metric_definitions.in_concept_token_count: lemma tokens occurring inside ayahs that activate this concept
